issue.title: www.oregonlive.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.oregonlive.com/sports/2026/06/trail-blazers-risky-coaching-hire-is-unprecedented-and-scandalous-could-it-also-be-genius-bill-oram.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.oregonlive.com%2Fsports%2F2026%2F06%2Ftrail-blazers-risky-coaching-hire-is-unprecedented-and-scandalous-could-it-also-be-genius-bill-oram.html) ### Comment > Oddly I get the same "turn off your ad blocker" screen after I've disabled AdGuard via the browser extension. Not sure why it hasn't noticed - maybe stored in cookies or something. ### Screenshots
